auth.label: API Key
auth.description: Geckoboard API key used as the HTTP Basic username. Find it in Geckoboard Account details under API Key: https://developer.geckoboard.com/#find-your-api-key

actions.name: append_dataset_data
actions.description: Append records to a Geckoboard dataset, updating existing rows when unique_by fields match.

datasetId.description: The Geckoboard dataset identifier, such as sales.by_day.

items.description: A record whose keys match the dataset fields. Values must match the field types declared in Geckoboard.

records.description: Dataset records to write to Geckoboard.

deleteBy.description: A date or datetime field name Geckoboard should use when truncating old records.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for appending records to a Geckoboard dataset.

outputSchema.description: The empty object returned by Geckoboard for this request.

actions.name: delete_dataset
actions.description: Delete a Geckoboard dataset by identifier.

datasetId.description: The Geckoboard dataset identifier, such as sales.by_day.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for deleting a Geckoboard dataset.

outputSchema.description: The empty object returned by Geckoboard for this request.

actions.name: find_or_create_dataset
actions.description: Find or create a Geckoboard dataset with a declared field schema.

datasetId.description: The Geckoboard dataset identifier, such as sales.by_day.

additionalProperties.description: A Geckoboard dataset field definition. Include the documented type, name, optional flag, and type-specific options such as currency_code or time_unit.

fields.description: The dataset fields keyed by column name. Each field describes a Geckoboard column.

items.description: A field name included in the dataset fields object.

uniqueBy.description: Field names whose values uniquely identify records in the dataset.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for finding or creating a Geckoboard dataset.

additionalProperties.description: A Geckoboard dataset field definition. Include the documented type, name, optional flag, and type-specific options such as currency_code or time_unit.

fields.description: The dataset fields keyed by column name. Each field describes a Geckoboard column.

anyOf.description: The unique field names returned by Geckoboard when configured.

raw.description: The raw dataset object returned by Geckoboard.

outputSchema.description: The dataset definition returned by Geckoboard.

actions.name: replace_dataset_data
actions.description: Replace all records in a Geckoboard dataset with the supplied records.

datasetId.description: The Geckoboard dataset identifier, such as sales.by_day.

items.description: A record whose keys match the dataset fields. Values must match the field types declared in Geckoboard.

records.description: Dataset records to write to Geckoboard.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for replacing records in a Geckoboard dataset.

outputSchema.description: The empty object returned by Geckoboard for this request.
